content.en:
Time passed slowly, and another time passed.

At this time, the Monolith Tribe had completely transformed the Boulder Ancient Lair and completely stabilized the situation.

As a result, forces such as the Nine Towers began to let a group of Dao Ancestors enter the Ancient Nest of the Giant Stone and use the resources of the Giant Stone Tribe to improve their strength.

In this regard, the Boulder tribe naturally did not object.

After all, this in itself was one of the demands of the original negotiations, and it was one of the trivial demands, and it was naturally impossible for them to go back on this demand.

In that case, it will lead to a war with forces such as the Nine Towers, which will not be good!

......

Boulder nests.

Ye Tian and a group of Dao Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building came here, including the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor, the Sevenfold Ancestor, the Half-step Eightfold Ancestor, the Eightfold Ancestor, and the Ninefold Ancestor.

It can be said that there are Dao Ancestors at all stages of cultivation.

And Ye Tian also met some acquaintances, such as Xuanqin Dao Ancestor and Jin Xuan Dao Ancestor who were still in the realm of the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor.

"Xuanqin Dao Ancestor, where did you come from?"

Ye Tian asked with some curiosity.

He knew that once he got out of there, he wouldn't be allowed to go in!

And Xuanqin Dao Ancestor must be a real body this time, not a refined clone, so she must have come out from there!

"Yes!" Xuanqin Daozu nodded, "We came out of there, but we were allowed to do so, and Luohan Daozu said that there is an opportunity here, and there may be hope for us to comprehend the technique." Therefore, the Nine-Story Building made an exception for us to come out once, even if we didn't comprehend it this time, we could still enter there again!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

Xuanqin Dao Ancestor really wanted to ask Ye Tian if he had raised his life level to 9.9 in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm, but after thinking about it carefully, even if he really broke through, it must be a secret, so she didn't ask.

Soon, Ye Tian was separated from Xuanqin Dao Ancestor and the others.

After a while, Ye Tian was taken to the core area of the Boulder Ancient Nest.

Compared to the previous nests, today's megalithic nests have changed too much.

"It's all stone-like primitive antiquities!"

Along the way, Ye Tian did not find any other kinds of primordial antiquities.

You must know that there were many kinds of original antiquities here, but now you can't see any of them, and they have obviously been expelled by the megalithic tribe, and only the original antiquities of the stone are left here.

The other primordial artifacts were not of much value to the Monolithic Tribe, so they were all removed.

Anyway, there really is a shortage of primordial artifacts, and they can control countless primordial artifacts from the Silent Black Sea at any time.

Not long after, Ye Tian and the other Sevenfold Ancestors came to a pitch-black lake, and near this lake was a transformation-level primordial artifact stationed there.

Ye Tian glanced at this Avatar-level Primordial Antiquity, this was also the first time he had seen a Avatar-level Primordial Antiquity.

Before, I only saw one arm, so naturally I didn't really see it.

"What a terrifying breath!"

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

The other party obviously restrained his aura, but the aura that was invisibly emitted was enough for him to not get close, and the difference in strength between the two sides was too big.

The strength of this Avatar-level Primordial Ancient is definitely not inferior to that of Luohan Dao Ancestor, and it may even be even stronger.

At this time, the Ninefold Ancestor of the Nine-Story Building and other forces talked and communicated with this Avatar-level Primordial Antiquity.

This Avatar-level Primordial Ancient Nodding in agreement, let Ye Tian and the other Dao Ancestors enter this lake.

And the Nine-Fold Ancestor of the Nine-Story Building informed the value of the lake.

"This lake can raise your life level, and you can also absorb energy to improve your cultivation, and you can cultivate here for 30 million Origin Realms. After the past thirty million Origin Domain Eras, you must come out, and we will come back to pick you up when the time comes!"

After saying that, the Ninefold Ancestor left.

......

Ye Tian entered this lake, and immediately felt an incomparably pure and powerful energy, the level of this energy was very high, higher than any kind of energy that Ye Tian had absorbed in the past.

However, this energy is difficult to absorb.

But even so, if a Sevenfold Ancestor absorbs energy and cultivates here, he can also greatly improve his cultivation.

The only pity is that he can only cultivate here for 30 million Origin Realm Eras, if he has been cultivating here, it will not take too long to raise his cultivation to the peak realm of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor.

"The Boulder Tribe is too rich, this is probably just the tip of the iceberg!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But if you think about it carefully, if the Boulder Tribe is not rich, the Nine Towers will not negotiate and cooperate with the Boulder Tribe.

It must be that the Giant Stone Tribe has given too much, and the Nine-Story Building will finally compromise!

......

"Life Drain!"

"Devour!"

"Darkness!"

A Gate Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu was urged by Ye Tian to help him absorb the energy in this dark lake.

Rumble!!!!

An incomparably terrifying absorption speed appeared, allowing Ye Tian to frantically absorb the energy in this pitch-black lake, which was many times faster than other Dao Ancestors.

And such a terrifying absorption speed naturally attracted the attention of the Avatar-level Primordial Antiquity of the Boulder Tribe.

"This Sevenfold Ancestral ......"

Transformation-level primordial antiquities-Longshi frowned slightly, he felt that Ye Tian was a little weird, this absorption speed was too abnormal!

Even the absorption speed of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor may not be comparable to Ye Tian, but the Black Spirit Lake has little effect on the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, but it has a great effect on the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor.

"Forget it, no matter how much he absorbs a sevenfold ancestor, he can't absorb too much energy!"

Long Shi didn't see it, and no longer paid attention to Ye Tian.

In fact, even if Ye Tian really absorbed the energy of the Black Spirit Lake, he didn't dare to say anything.

After all, this was one of the contents of the cooperation between the Giant Stone Tribe and the forces such as the Nine-Story Building, and he had to let these Sevenfold Ancestors practice here.

Time passes slowly –

Ye Tian was constantly absorbing the energy of the Black Spirit Lake here, and his cultivation and life level were rapidly improving.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had been cultivating here for nearly 30 million years of the Origin Domain Era.

At this time, Ye Tian's cultivation had already broken through to the realm of the peak of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, and he was only one step away from the peak of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, as if he was about to break through soon.

Airplanes!!!!

The Ninefold Ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building came over, and Ye Tian's cultivation time was up.

So, Ye Tian and they came out.

Ye Tian originally thought that he was going to leave the Boulder Ancient Nest this time, but he didn't expect this Ninefold Origin Ancestor to take him to a place again.

This is an incomparably large sacred tree.

The moment he saw this divine tree, Ye Tian recognized the identity of this divine tree—the original antiquity!

However, this primordial artifact is afraid that it is not ordinary, and its strength is definitely terrifying, even if it does not reach the transformation level, it is definitely a half-step nine-fold ancestor.

However, it lost its life and was just a shell.
